ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-15-2024 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Feb-14-2024 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-30-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated 10/21/17 is admitted to probate. Simon Walcott Henry-Keyes is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open court. Status on close of estate is set for February 14, 2024, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Singh. Matter not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-07-2022 Continued To Jan-30-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
